title: rosa cinnamomea var. oxyodon
intro: Rosa cinnamomea var. oxyodon, also known as the Chinese rose or fragrant rose, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to China and is highly valued for its medicinal and aromatic properties. The plant is used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Rosa cinnamomea var. oxyodon include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support overall well-being.
